title: Calm Partner User
description: A user provisioned by a Calm Business or Calm Health partner via the Partner API or eligibility file.

partner_user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user within the partner's system (employee ID, member ID, or hashed email).

calm_user_id.description: Calm-side user identifier returned after linking.

segments.description: Optional partner-supplied segmentation columns (up to three) used for demographic reporting.

product.description: Which Calm product the user is provisioned for.
